statement: The lipid mechanism's out-of-sample win is robust across a SECOND clean independent dataset (Kim 2019 brown-rice grain BAF), beating the free-anion/monotone baseline by > 1.0 log10, so the generalization is not a single-dataset (Tang) artifact.

confidence.basis: threshold rule: statistic 'point'=1.57 > 1 is met (combine='latest', margin=0.57)
